docs.text: I am pursuing my PhD at the Computational and Data Sciences department at IISc in Bengaluru, India. Experience ¶ May 2021 - April 2022 As the part of my masters thesis, under the guidance of Prof. Sudeshna Sinha, we studied the robustness of self organised criticality in the presence of random links for a biological evolution model and an interesting emergent "activity network" we found in the system. June - July 2021 Teaching Education ¶ BS-MS with a Physics Major at Indian Institute of Science Education and Research, Mohali with a CPI of 8.8 out of 10. Class 12 Complete in Kendriya Vidyalaya, IIT Kanpur with average of 93%. Skills ¶
